title: centaurea sonchifolia subsp. malacitana
intro: Centaurea sonchifolia subsp. malacitana is a subspecies of the Centaurea sonchifolia plant, commonly known as yellow centaury, which is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea sonchifolia subsp. malacitana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
